properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v3 v3 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father, I said till Death do us part I want to mean it With all of my heart Help me to love You More than I love her Then I know I can Love her more Than anyone else

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And bring her in Your presence today Make her what You want her to be

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I pray to hear her heart I pray she'll love You more I pray to cherish and serve her And we'll bring You glory today, I pray

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Father, I said till Death do us part I want to mean it With all of my heart

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Help me to love You More than I love him Then I know I can Love him more Than anyone else

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And bring him in Your presence today Make him what You want him to be

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I pray to hear his heart I pray he'll love You more I pray to cherish and serve him And we'll bring You glory today, I pray

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Lord, help me love her As You love the church, Your bride Help me submit to him As I submit to You, my life
